title: The water cooler is not working
description: The water cooler of vs hostel of my wing is not working . I have to go to the mess to fill my water bottle . So please try to resolve this as soon as possible.

title: Hostel mess fee submission issue
description: i was not able to submit my hostel mess fee on the given qr code by mess . so i request you to kindly look into the matter

title: WiFi not working
description: the wifi of the vs hostel is not working like the login to vs is not appearing in which we have to submit our roll number and password is not appearing so we are not able to use the wifi.

title: Unable to login to my student account
description:
I am unable to log in to my student account on the university portal. 
Whenever I enter my correct email and password, the system either shows an authentication error or keeps loading without granting access.

Because of this issue, I cannot access my course materials, assignments, or important announcements. 
I have already tried resetting my password and clearing my browser cache, but the problem still persists.

Please help me regain access to my account as soon as possible so that I can continue my academic work without interruption.

title: Grade dispute regarding exam
description: I believe my exam has been graded incorrectly and request a review.
adminReply: Your dispute has been resolved by the Academic Team.

title: Course material not loading
description: I am unable to access course materials from the portal even after refreshing.
adminReply: Our support team is currently working on your issue.

title: Lab assignment submission issue
description: I am facing some issues submitting my lab assignment due to unexpected personal circumstances.
adminReply: We received your request and will respond shortly.
